name: eastbase
description: Eastbase Studio's shared Claude Code tooling. Ships eastbase-premium-ui (the house standard for premium, personality-rich product UI — charts/tables/analytics/admin, empty/loading/error states, layout, dark-mode/contrast), eastbase-review-pr (the Eastbase product/SaaS/risk review overlay for PRs, diffs, branches, and agent-generated changes), and eastbase-launch-check (the practical pre-launch / go-live readiness gate for eastbase products).
